name: Slow Cooker Pork Chop and Potatoes in Mustard Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 can cream of mushroom soup, 10 oz
6 medium potatoes, cut into thin slices
recipeInstructions:
Serves 6
In a skillet, brown pork chops on both sides in hot oil. Drain fat.
In any size Crock-Pot, mix cream of mushroom soup, chicken broth, mustard, thyme, garlic (or garlic powder), and black pepper. Add potatoes and onion, stirring to coat. Place browned pork chops on top of potato mixture. Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 10 hours or High for 4 to 5 hours.
